mapper.select:
SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB00-07_1#Sql002 */ RN.TITLE AS TITLE, TO_CHAR(RN.UPDATE_TIME, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') AS UPDATE_TIME, NVL2(RN.DETAILED_FILE,'1','0') AS DETAILED_FILE, RN.RELEASE_NOTE_NO AS RELEASE_NOTE_NO, RNC.MENU_NAME AS MENU_NAME, RNC.SCREEN_NAME AS SCREEN_NAME, RNC.CONTENT AS CONTENT, RNC.RELEASE_NOTE_CO_NO AS RELEASE_NOTE_CO_NO FROM CORDYS.RELEASE_NOTE RN LEFT OUTER JOIN RELEASE_NOTE_CONTENTS RNC ON RN.RELEASE_NOTE_NO = RNC.RELEASE_NOTE_NO
RN.DISPLAYED_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{displayYear} || '0101', 'YYYYMMDD') AND RN.DISPLAYED_DATE <= TO_DATE(#{displayYear} || '1231', 'YYYYMMDD') AND RN.DISPLAYED_DATE <= SYSDATE
ORDER BY RN.DISPLAYED_DATE DESC, RN.RELEASE_NOTE_NO DESC, RNC.RELEASE_NOTE_CO_NO ASC
mapper.update: MERGE /* @SQLID=SUB00-07_1#Sql003 */ INTO CORDYS.RELEASE_NOTE_READ RNR USING ( SELECT #{userId} AS USER_ID FROM DUAL ) A ON ( RNR.USER_ID = A.USER_ID ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET LAST_READ_TIME = SYSDATE, UPDATE_TIME = SYSDATE, UPDATE_USER = A.USER_ID WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( USER_ID, LAST_READ_TIME, NEXT_DISP_FLG, CREATE_TIME, CREATE_USER, UPDATE_TIME, UPDATE_USER ) VALUES ( A.USER_ID, SYSDATE, '1', SYSDATE, A.USER_ID, SYSDATE, A.USER_ID )

UPDATE /* @SQLID=SUB00-07_1#Sql004 */ CORDYS.RELEASE_NOTE_READ SET NEXT_DISP_FLG = #{req.nextDispFlg}, UPDATE_TIME = SYSDATE, UPDATE_USER = #{req.userId}
USER_ID = #{req.userId}
mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB00-07_1#Sql005 */ TO_CHAR(NVL(MIN(DISPLAYED_DATE), SYSDATE), 'YYYY') AS MIN_YEAR FROM CORDYS.RELEASE_NOTE
